common.appDescription: Payment via credit and debit card billing or PayPal demo

checkout.headline: Payment-Method
checkout.subheadline: Payment via credit and debit card billing or PayPal demo
checkout.info: Credit card and PayPal demo form. This is for demonstration purposes only; no actual payments will be charged.
checkout.phoneHelper: After payment approval, a notification will be sent automatically via the KakaoTalk API.
checkout.paypalSandboxHint: PayPal Sandbox tests require a client ID and secret issued from PayPal Developer.

validation.amountMin: Payment amount must be an integer of 1,000 KRW or more.
validation.phoneInvalid: Enter the phone number that should receive KakaoTalk notifications in 01012345678 format.
validation.missingTossKey: Set the NEXT_PUBLIC_TOSS_CLIENT_KEY environment variable first.
validation.paymentWindowError: An error occurred while opening the payment window.

paypal.sdkLoadError: Failed to load the PayPal SDK script.
paypal.missingClientId: Set the NEXT_PUBLIC_PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID environment variable first.
paypal.createOrderError: Failed to create the PayPal order.
paypal.missingOrderId: The approved PayPal order ID is missing.
paypal.captureError: Failed to capture the PayPal payment.
paypal.paymentError: An error occurred during the PayPal payment.
paypal.renderError: An error occurred while rendering the PayPal button.

success.title: Payment confirmation result
success.missingParams: The URL is missing required payment confirmation parameters.
success.missingLocalOrder: Could not find the local order data. Retry the payment in the same browser.
success.amountMismatch: The requested amount and confirmation amount do not match. Payment confirmation was blocked.
success.apiError: The payment confirmation API request failed.

fail.title: Payment failed
fail.alert: The payment did not complete successfully.
